issues.detail: Skill file lacks error handling and edge case coverage.
Skill assumes Docker and bash, limiting cross-platform compatibility.
Uses git clone from official source without checksum verification.
Pulls Docker images without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Docker deploy + add Postgres database via API
scenarios.rationale: Baseline misses the docker-compose-non-dev.yml file and the exact /api/v1/security/login JSON body with provider:db; treatment follows the documented bearer-token flow and POSTs to /api/v1/database/ with the correct payload.

scenarios.name: Export and re-import dashboard ZIP
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses wrong query parameters (id=1 not q=[1]) and wrong multipart field (file not formData) with no overwrite flag; treatment matches the documented /api/v1/dashboard/export/?q=[1] and /api/v1/dashboard/import/ formData=@dashboard.zip pattern.
